response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his recent work is primarily in TypeScript/Node.js, making his fit for this role uncertain despite relevant open-source GIS work.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world NGO usage
Demonstrated ability to work across languages and stacks, including DLang and Linux systems
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling with practical workshops
concerns: No visible professional experience with C++ or Rust in routing or navigation systems
Recent roles focus on web/TypeScript, not low-latency geospatial data pipelines
Lacks explicit experience with distributed systems, fault tolerance, or map tile optimization

key_factors.factor: Lack of C++/Rust in routing context
